{"step_by_step_thinking": "The 1-3 beta-d-glucan assay is mentioned in the documents as a marker used to improve diagnostic accuracy for invasive candidiasis. It is stated that because of the low sensitivity of blood cultures for Candida spp, surrogate markers like 1-3 beta-d-glucan can be used. The assay is not mentioned in relation to Cryptococcus, Penicillium, or Rhinicerebral mucormycosis.", "answer_choice": "A"}
